name: Cleartext Credentials on Network
description: Detects transmission of cleartext credentials over network (FTP, Telnet, HTTP Basic Auth)
query:
// Cleartext Credential Detection (NDR)
// Unencrypted passwords detected on network
events from ndr_flow
where (protocol = "ftp" and command contains "PASS")
  or (protocol = "telnet" and payload contains "password")
  or (protocol = "http" and headers contains "Authorization: Basic")
  or (protocol = "smtp" and command = "AUTH PLAIN")
group by source_ip, destination_ip
having count(*) >= 1
within 60 seconds
